mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(notice.UN_NO) AS count FROM TBL_NOTICE notice LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON notice.UN_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_USEYN = 'N' AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'N'
AND notice.UN_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode}
AND institution_master.UIS_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
AND notice.UN_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND notice.UN_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hope.UHP_EBOOK_ISBN) AS count FROM TBL_HOPEBOOK_PROPOSAL hope LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON hope.UHP_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND hope.UHP_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode}
AND institution_master.UIS_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
AND hope.UHP_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName2}, '%')
AND hope.UHP_STATE_FLAG = #{status}
AND STR_TO_DATE(hope.UHP_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND STR_TO_DATE(hope.UHP_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT hope.UHP_CODE AS h_uhp_code , hope.UHP_UIS_CODE AS h_uis_code , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS h_uis_name , member.UM_USERID AS h_um_userid , hope.UHP_CONTENT AS h_content , DATE_FORMAT(hope.UHP_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS h_regdate FROM TBL_HOPEBOOK_PROPOSAL hope LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON hope.UHP_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member ON member.UM_CODE = hope.UHP_UM_CODE and institution_master.UIS_CODE = member.UM_UIS_CODE WHERE hope.UHP_EBOOK_ISBN = #{h_ebook_isbn}
AND institution_master.UIS_CODE = #{h_uis_code}
SELECT UCM_CODE AS h_ucm_code , UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS h_ebook_isbn FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER WHERE UCM_EBOOK_ISBN = #{h_ebook_isbn}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_HOPEBOOK_PROPOSAL
UHP_STATE_FLAG = #{h_state_flag}, UHP_STATE_MESSAGE = #{h_state_message},
UHP_UCM_CODE = #{h_ucm_code},
UHP_EBOOK_ISBN = #{h_new_ebook_isbn}, UHP_ISBN_TYPE = #{h_isbn_type},
WHERE UHP_EBOOK_ISBN = #{h_ebook_isbn}
mapper.select: SELECT notice.UN_NO AS un_no , notice.UN_TITLE AS un_title , notice.UN_UIS_CODE AS un_uis_code , notice.UN_CONTENT AS un_content , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS un_uis_name , notice.UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE AS un_display_startdate , notice.UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE AS un_display_enddate FROM TBL_NOTICE notice LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON notice.UN_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE notice.UN_NO = #{un_no}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_NOTICE ( UN_NO, UN_TITLE, UN_UIS_CODE, UN_CONTENT, UN_AM_USERID, UN_NOTICE_TYPE, UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE
) VALUES ( #{un_no}, #{un_title}, #{un_uis_code}, #{un_content}, #{un_am_userid}, 'N', CONCAT(#{un_display_startdate}, ' 00:00:00') ,CONCAT(#{un_display_enddate}, ' 23:59:59') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET UN_TITLE = #{un_title}, UN_UIS_CODE = #{un_uis_code}, UN_CONTENT = #{un_content}, UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE = CONCAT(#{un_display_startdate}, ' 00:00:00'), UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE = CONCAT(#{un_display_enddate}, ' 23:59:59') WHERE UN_NO = #{un_no}

SELECT MAX(SEQ_CURRVAL)+1 FROM TBL_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
UPDATE TBL_SEQUENCES SET SEQ_CURRVAL = #{seq_currval} WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(appnotice.UAN_NO) AS count FROM TBL_APP_NOTICE appnotice WHERE 1 = 1
AND appnotice.UAN_UIS_CODE = ''
AND appnotice.UAN_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND appnotice.UAN_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')

SELECT appnotice.UAN_NO AS uan_no , appnotice.UAN_TITLE AS uan_title , appnotice.UAN_UIS_CODE AS uan_uis_code , appnotice.UAN_AM_USERID AS uan_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(appnotice.UAN_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS uan_regdate , DATE_FORMAT(appnotice.UAN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS uan_display_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(appnotice.UAN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS uan_display_enddate , appnotice.UAN_USEYN AS uan_useyn FROM TBL_APP_NOTICE appnotice
WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( appnotice.UAN_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode} OR appnotice.UAN_UIS_CODE = '' )
AND appnotice.UAN_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND appnotice.UAN_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
ORDER BY appnotice.${sortField1}
ORDER BY appnotice.UAN_REGDATE DESC
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}

SELECT appnotice.UAN_NO AS uan_no , appnotice.UAN_TITLE AS uan_title , appnotice.UAN_UIS_CODE AS uan_uis_code , appnotice.UAN_CONTENT AS uan_content , appnotice.UAN_MORE_URL AS uan_more_url , appnotice.UAN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE AS uan_display_startdate , appnotice.UAN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE AS uan_display_enddate , appnotice.UAN_USEYN AS uan_useyn FROM TBL_APP_NOTICE appnotice WHERE appnotice.UAN_NO = #{uan_no}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_APP_NOTICE SET UAN_TITLE = #{uan_title}, UAN_UIS_CODE = #{uan_uis_code}, UAN_CONTENT = #{uan_content}, UAN_MORE_URL = #{uan_more_url}, UAN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE = #{uan_display_startdate}, UAN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE = #{uan_display_enddate}, UAN_USEYN = #{uan_useyn} WHERE UAN_NO = #{uan_no}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(appbook.UAEB_NO) AS count FROM TBL_APP_NEWBOOK appbook WHERE 1 = 1
AND appbook.UAEB_UIS_CODE = ''
AND appbook.UAEB_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND appbook.UAEB_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')

SELECT appbook.UAEB_NO AS uaeb_no , appbook.UAEB_TITLE AS uaeb_title , appbook.UAEB_UIS_CODE AS uaeb_uis_code , appbook.UAEB_AM_USERID AS uaeb_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(appbook.UAEB_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS uaeb_regdate , DATE_FORMAT(appbook.UAEB_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS uaeb_display_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(appbook.UAEB_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS uaeb_display_enddate , appbook.UAEB_USEYN AS uaeb_useyn FROM TBL_APP_NEWBOOK appbook
WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( appbook.UAEB_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode} OR appbook.UAEB_UIS_CODE = '' )
AND appbook.UAEB_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND appbook.UAEB_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
ORDER BY appbook.${sortField1}
ORDER BY appbook.UAEB_REGDATE DESC
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}

SELECT appbook.UAEB_NO AS uaeb_no , appbook.UAEB_TITLE AS uaeb_title , appbook.UAEB_UIS_CODE AS uaeb_uis_code , appbook.UAEB_DISPLAY_STARTDATE AS uaeb_display_startdate , appbook.UAEB_DISPLAY_ENDDATE AS uaeb_display_enddate , appbook.UAEB_USEYN AS uaeb_useyn FROM TBL_APP_NEWBOOK appbook WHERE appbook.UAEB_NO = #{uaeb_no}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_APP_NEWBOOK SET UAEB_TITLE = #{uaeb_title}, UAEB_UIS_CODE = #{uaeb_uis_code}, UAEB_DISPLAY_STARTDATE = #{uaeb_display_startdate}, UAEB_DISPLAY_ENDDATE = #{uaeb_display_enddate}, UAEB_USEYN = #{uaeb_useyn} WHERE UAEB_NO = #{uaeb_no}
mapper.select: SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE AS ucm_ucp_code , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucm_publisher , contents_master.UCM_COVER_URL AS ucm_cover_url , cp_master.UCP_NAME AS ucp_name , cp_master.UCP_CP_BRAND AS ucp_cp_brand , cp_master.UCP_BRAND AS ucp_brand FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CP_MASTER cp_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = cp_master.UCP_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_CODE IN (SELECT UAEBL_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_APP_NEWBOOK_LIST WHERE UAEBL_UAEB_NO = #{uaeb_no})
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET UN_USEYN = 'Y' WHERE UN_NO in
#{item}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(notice.UN_NO) AS count FROM TBL_NOTICE notice LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON notice.UN_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_USEYN = 'N' AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'P'
AND notice.UN_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode}
AND institution_master.UIS_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
AND notice.UN_REGDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND notice.UN_REGDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_NOTICE ( UN_NO, UN_TITLE, UN_UIS_CODE, UN_CONTENT, UN_AM_USERID, UN_NOTICE_TYPE, UN_IMAGE_URL, UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, UN_MESSAGE, UN_EXPIRY_DATE, UN_EVENT_URL
) VALUES ( #{un_no}, #{un_title}, #{un_uis_code}, #{un_content}, #{un_am_userid}, 'P', #{un_image_url}, CONCAT(#{un_display_startdate}, ' 00:00:00'), CONCAT(#{un_display_enddate}, ' 23:59:59'), #{un_message}, #{un_expiry_date} ,#{un_event_option} )
mapper.select: SELECT notice.UN_NO AS un_no , notice.UN_TITLE AS un_title , notice.UN_UIS_CODE AS un_uis_code , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS un_uis_name , notice.UN_AM_USERID AS un_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS un_regdate , notice.UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE AS un_display_startdate , notice.UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE AS un_display_enddate , notice.UN_IMAGE_URL AS un_image_url , notice.UN_MESSAGE AS un_message , notice.UN_EXPIRY_DATE AS un_expiry_date , notice.UN_EVENT_URL AS un_event_url FROM TBL_NOTICE notice LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON notice.UN_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_USEYN = 'N' AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'P' AND notice.UN_NO = #{un_no}

SELECT notice.UN_NO AS un_no , notice.UN_UIS_CODE AS un_uis_code , '공지팝업' AS un_uis_name , DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS un_display_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS un_display_enddate , notice.UN_IMAGE_URL AS un_image_url , notice.UN_MESSAGE AS un_message , notice.UN_EXPIRY_DATE AS un_expiry_date , notice.UN_EVENT_URL AS un_event_url FROM TBL_NOTICE notice LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON notice.UN_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_USEYN = 'N' AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ( notice.UN_UIS_CODE is null or notice.UN_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) AND DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY notice.UN_REGDATE DESC Limit 2;
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET UN_UIS_CODE = #{un_uis_code}, UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE = CONCAT(#{un_display_startdate}, ' 00:00:00'), UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE = CONCAT(#{un_display_enddate}, ' 23:59:59'), UN_IMAGE_URL = #{un_image_url}, UN_MESSAGE = #{un_message}, UN_EXPIRY_DATE = #{un_expiry_date}, UN_AM_USERID = #{un_am_userid}, UN_EVENT_URL = #{un_event_option} WHERE UN_NO = #{un_no}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE UN_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND UN_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= NOW() AND UN_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= NOW() AND UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'P' AND UN_USEYN = 'N'
